title: Blockbuster Rental Night
text:
## Blockbuster Night Checklist

**Arrival:** Before {number} PM for best {adjective} selection.

**Browse:**
- {adjective} aisle first
- {verb} new releases near the {adjective} display

**Rent:**
- One {adjective} movie
- One {adjective} comedy
- Zero damaged {plural noun} cases

**Snacks:** {adjective} candy and a soda the size of a {object}.

**At home:** {verb} the tape, ignore tracking lines, and {verb} during previews.

**Return by:** {number} PM or pay a {adjective} late fee that feels {adjective}.

**Bonus:** Argue about whether to rewind.
